_comment: Production spoke VNet with a critical UDR. The addressPrefix field is returned as a bare string instead of a one-element array. This can occur when: (1) the JSON was hand-edited or generated by a non-standard tool, (2) an ARM API response was serialized by a custom pipeline that did not preserve array wrapping for single-element arrays. The critical UDR (udr-force-nva) sends all traffic through the NVA firewall at 10.0.0.4. If this route is silently dropped by the preprocessor, the Default Internet route wins for 0.0.0.0/0 traffic — an NVA bypass that sends cleartext traffic directly to the Internet instead of through the firewall.
